title: RuntimeHealth
description: The runtime health of the specific inbound endpoint details as specified in the topic.

lastUpdateTime.description: The timestamp (RFC3339) when the health status was last updated, even if the status did not change.

message.description: A human-readable message describing the last transition.

reasonCode.description: Unique, CamelCase reason code describing the cause of the last health state transition.

status.description: The current health status of the resource.

version.description: The version of the resource for which the runtime health is being reported.
